article.title: Warsh will cut rates, despite consensus view of rate hikes: Analyst
article.summary: The current Federal Funds target rate is between 350 and 375 basis points, which traders project to rise by at least 25 basis points in December 2026.

article.title: Binance denies new WSJ report alleging $850M in Iran-linked transactions
article.summary: Binance CEO Richard Teng denied a new WSJ report alleging $850 million in Iran-linked transactions flowed through the exchange to the IRGC.

headline: Uber Bids €10 Billion for Delivery Hero Stake

article.title: Uber Proposes Delivery Hero Takeover at €10 Billion Valuation
article.summary: Uber Technologies Inc. has offered to take over Delivery Hero SE in a deal that would value the German delivery company at about €10 billion ($11.6 billion) as it seeks to ramp up competition with DoorDash Inc. outside the US.

headline: Fed's Inflation Gauge Surges 6% Amid War Fears

article.title: More War-Driven Inflation Seen in Fed’s Favored Gauge
article.summary: The Federal Reserve’s favored top-line inflation gauge is rapidly approaching 4% as a war-driven spike in energy costs generates unease that price pressures will broaden.

headline: Bitcoin Holdings Surge 20% Amid Physical Storage Demand

article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

The History and Future of Physical Bitcoin
Bitcoin is invisible code — but for over a decade, creators have turned it into coins, cards, and USBs you can touch. Here’s how close we’ve gotten to real, cash-like BTC.

article.title: Bitcoin Dives Below $75K for First Time in a Month as Crypto Liquidations Near $1 Billion
article.summary: Bitcoin touched its lowest price in a month overnight following an awful week for ETFs, which shed over $1.25 billion this week.

headline: ECB Warns EU: Stablecoin Rule Easing Hits Bank Capital

article.title: ECB warns EU finance ministers that easing euro stablecoin rules would weaken banks: Reuters
article.summary: ECB President Christine Lagarde warned the changes would destabilize bank funding and weaken interest-rate transmission.

headline: FTX Settlement: $66M Payout Over Crypto Fraud Claims

article.title: FTX’s former law firm, auditor agree to pay $66 million to settle customer claims over fraud
article.summary: The law firm, Fenwick & West, denied wrongdoing and still faces a separate $525 million suit in Washington that is not covered by Friday's deal.

headline: Oil Prices Plummet 5% on 60-Day Ceasefire Extension

article.title: US and Iran move closer to extending ceasefire by 60 days, say mediators
article.summary: Terms of the deal include the gradual reopening of the Strait of Hormuz

headline: US Oil Output Surges 10% Amid Iran Tensions

article.title: US oil producers increase output to capture price surge from Iran war
article.summary: Drilling expansion follows 40 per cent jump in cost from global supply crunch that has dented president’s approval ratings
